nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌木林
nodes.summary: 灌木林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联86种鸟类，包括Swallow-tailed nightjar、蓝臀毛腿蜂鸟、黄翅星额蜂鸟等86种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Eye-ringed thistletail
nodes.summary: Eye-ringed thistletail（Eye-ringed thistletail，学名 Asthenes palpebralis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于云雾森林、灌木林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the narrow ecotone of the upper edges of cloudforest and the elfin forest above it

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the narrow ecotone of the upper edges of cloudforest and the elfin forest above it

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "Land-use practises such as burning, grazing, and the conversion/clearance of paramo grasslands and forest patches for small-scale agriculture has greatly reduced the total surface extent of the linear Andean tree-line ecotone [and the] effects of habitat loss on the tree-line bird community have not yet been studied quantitatively."
